heading: Effective date
label: 78hh Effective date
text: This chapter shall become effective on , except that sections 78f and 78(b to e) of this title shall become effective on ; and sections 78e, 78g, 78h, 78i(a)(6), 78j, 78k, 78(a), 78m, 78n, 78, 78p, 78q, 78r, 78s, and 78dd of this title shall become effective on .July 1, 1934September 1, 1934October 1, 1934llo
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “This Act”. See References in Text note set out under .section 78a of this title
